sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62302" key="leixh/nwr" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λειχήνωρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ορος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n62302.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Lick-man</tr_>, name of a mouse, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1220.tlg001:202" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Batr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">202</biblScope> </bibl>:—so also <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λειχομύλη</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῠ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Lick-meal</tr_>, name of a mouse, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1220.tlg001:29" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">29</biblScope> </bibl>; <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λειχοπίναξ</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῐ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ᾰκος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Lick-platter</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1220.tlg001:100" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">100</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1220.tlg001:230" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">230</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
